ORDR.description: Sales order header table representing customer purchase commitments.
ORDR.business_meaning: customer sales pipeline, open orders, order value, order count, delivery tracking
ORDR.embedding_text: sales order customer order order value open orders pending orders overdue delivery sales pipeline order count customer commitment

columns.\"DocEntry\": internal unique id for the sales order
columns.\"DocNum\": sales order number shown to users
columns.\"DocStatus\": status, O for open and C for closed

RDR1.description: Sales order line items table with item-level quantity, price and delivery details.
RDR1.business_meaning: order line items, ordered quantity, item-level order value, pending delivery quantity
RDR1.embedding_text: sales order lines order items ordered quantity open quantity item details delivery line total item spend

columns.\"DocEntry\": links the line to sales order header
columns.\"LineStatus\": line status, O for open and C for closed

OINV.description: AR Invoice (sales invoice) header table representing finalized customer billing.
OINV.business_meaning: sales revenue, customer billing, invoiced amount, balance receivable derived from DocTotal minus PaidToDate, paid amount, sales invoice analysis
OINV.embedding_text: ar invoice sales invoice customer invoice revenue billing invoiced amount balance due receivable paid amount pending collection outstanding unpaid tax invoice count

columns.\"DocEntry\": internal unique id for the AR invoice
columns.\"DocNum\": AR invoice number shown to users
columns.\"PaidToDate\": amount collected to date; derive remaining receivable balance as "DocTotal" - IFNULL("PaidToDate", 0)
columns.\"DocStatus\": status, O for open and C for closed

INV1.description: AR Invoice line items table with item-level billed quantities, prices and taxes.
INV1.business_meaning: invoice line items, item-level billing, invoiced quantity, item revenue
INV1.embedding_text: ar invoice lines sales invoice items billed quantity invoiced item value item revenue price tax warehouse

columns.\"DocEntry\": links the line to AR invoice header
columns.\"VatSum\": tax amount on the invoice line when available
columns.\"TaxCode\": tax code on the invoice line when available
columns.\"LineStatus\": line status, O for open and C for closed
columns.\"BaseType\": base document type; 17 means sales order

ORDN.description: Sales return header table representing customer returned goods or credit memo source documents.
ORDN.business_meaning: sales returns, customer returns, returned value, return count, credit against sales
ORDN.embedding_text: sales return customer return returned goods return value credit memo return count customer refund

columns.\"DocEntry\": internal unique id for the sales return
columns.\"DocNum\": sales return number shown to users
columns.\"DocStatus\": status, O for open and C for closed

RDN1.description: Sales return line items table with item-level returned quantity, price and line value.
RDN1.business_meaning: sales return lines, returned items, returned quantity, item-level return value
RDN1.embedding_text: sales return lines returned items returned quantity return line total customer returned products

columns.\"DocEntry\": links the line to sales return header
columns.\"LineStatus\": line status, O for open and C for closed

OCRD.description: Business partner master table for customers and vendors.
OCRD.business_meaning: customer master, customer details, customer name, customer code, business partner
OCRD.embedding_text: customer master customer details customer name customer code business partner client buyer

columns.\"CardType\": C for customer, S for supplier

OITM.description: Item master table for all products and services.
OITM.business_meaning: item master, product catalog, item name, item code, stock level
OITM.embedding_text: item master product catalog item name item code stock level inventory product details
